item.title: Clean brows, natural look
item.description: Learn a simple brow routine: brush brows both ways to spot sparse areas and keep them looking natural.

media:content.media:title: Clean brows, natural look
media:content.media:description: Learn a simple brow routine: brush brows both ways to spot sparse areas and keep them looking natural.

item.title: Simple foundation routine for smoother-looking skin
item.description: Learn a simple foundation routine that can make skin look instantly smoother. This quick makeup tip helps create a flawless-looking base.

media:content.media:title: Simple foundation routine for smoother-looking skin
media:content.media:description: Learn a simple foundation routine that can make skin look instantly smoother. This quick makeup tip helps create a flawless-looking base.

item.title: Celebrity Makeup Hack to Lift Your Eyes
item.description: Learn a simple makeup hack to help lift the look of your eyes. This quick tutorial shares a celebrity-inspired approach for a more defined eye makeup finish.

media:content.media:title: Celebrity Makeup Hack to Lift Your Eyes
media:content.media:description: Learn a simple makeup hack to help lift the look of your eyes. This quick tutorial shares a celebrity-inspired approach for a more defined eye makeup finish.

item.title: Blythe Doll-Inspired Makeup Look

item.title: Reset cakey foundation for a fresh finish
item.description: Learn a simple reset for cakey foundation to bring the skin back to life and refresh your makeup finish.

media:content.media:title: Reset cakey foundation for a fresh finish
media:content.media:description: Learn a simple reset for cakey foundation to bring the skin back to life and refresh your makeup finish.

item.title: Glam Eyes for Hooded Lids
item.description: Learn how to create beautiful glam eyes with this makeup tutorial inspired by droopy eyelids. Follow simple tips to define and lift the eyes.

media:content.media:description: Learn how to create beautiful glam eyes with this makeup tutorial inspired by droopy eyelids. Follow simple tips to define and lift the eyes.
